steps.t: Merry's pipe-weed might be found near the baths in the Southern Great Guest-house, among the High Stables, or near the end of the prow of Minas Tirith…
Merethrond can be found near the Tower of Ecthelion in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). You did not find Merry's pipe-weed in any of the locations he mention…
Toldir can be found in Merethrond. Upon entering Merethrond, Toldir tried to get your attention. You should talk to Toldir.
Merry's pipe-weed can be found at the base of the stairs to the kitchens in Merethrond. Toldir informed you that he left Merry's pipe-weed in the kitc…
Merry can be found in Merethrond. You have collected Merry's pipe-weed and should now return it to him.
